meaning: n.漆木纹,漆成木纹的方法
examples: Hair like graining is also evident in some of them.
We could also see graining on the rear tyres here too.
I was struggling with tyre graining and lack of grip.
"You can see the drivers struggling after a few laps with the graining, especially on the soft compound, " said Giancarlo Fisichella, a 13-year F1 veteran who switched to sports-car racing in 2009.
